spec_match.rationale: Simulates the Push API resubscription lifecycle beautifully, accurately modeling the event payloads and timing for the new event contract.

interactive.rationale: The clickable state-machine buttons allow the user to visually step through and log each transition phase.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Frames the problem and the 138-based solution cleanly.

edge_cases.rationale: Lacks capability detection or a native support probe on load to tell the user if their browser supports service worker push subscriptions.

references.rationale: References the ChromeStatus feature entry and local index page.

design_system.rationale: Matches standard border, color, and alignment variables from the design system.

openQuestions.title: Add a real-world support detection badge for Push API
openQuestions.detail: Even though the demo is simulated, adding a support probe (e.g. checking if `'serviceWorker' in navigator && 'PushManager' in window`) would immediately show the user whether their active browser environment is capable of handling Push and Service Workers natively.

summary: A high-quality interactive simulation of the service worker pushsubscriptionchange lifecycle that teaches the concept effectively. However, it lacks a browser support detection probe.
